element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic point-and-shoot control mode with on-board computer feedback
Managing heat buildup from weapon fire to prevent emergency shutdown and catastrophic fusion engine detonation
Customizing weapons, armor, engine, and heat sinks between engagements
Independent management of mech legs and torso rotation for advanced tactical positioning
Directing companion mechs in multi-unit tactical formations
Real-time first-person combat against opposing pilot-controlled or AI mechs

typical_relief_triggers: Returning to mech lab between missions
Reaching safe zone or mission end
typical_tension_triggers: Weapon system damage or ammunition depletion
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating tactical tension during missions with heat management creating continuous micro-tension; relief provided by mission completion and mech customization downtime between engagements

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduces single-mech control with point-and-shoot basics; basic heat and weapon management
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Advanced control modes available; increased enemy mech encounters; more complex mission objectives
difficulty_curve.late_game: Squad command mechanics introduced; multiple objective types; increased tactical complexity
notable_spikes: First enemy mech encounter requiring heat management mastery
Introduction of squad commands requiring multi-unit coordination
Ideological faction conflict missions (Jade Falcon vs. Clan Wolf storyline)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each mission takes place on distinct fictional extrasolar planets named from franchise canon, varying environmental context without apparent spatial repetition
Missions structured around clear tactical goals (search-and-destroy, reconnaissance, base strike) rather than linear navigation
Mech Lab customization between missions creates variable tactical approaches; players can optimize for heat management, firepower, or armor between attempts
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All missions following first customization opportunity
